description: Letter from the yeshiva in Pumbedita to two people from Qayrawan, around 850. The yeshiva members complain about the economic support that they get from the west, which is much less than the support for the yeshiva in Sura. The writer is probably Hayye b. Sherira, who would become gaon later. (Information from Gil, Kingdom. Vol. 2, #4) VMR
description_he: מכתב מהישיבה בפומבדיתא לשני אנשים מקיירואן, כ-850, על תמיכה כלכלית נמוכה מהמערב לעומת הישיבה בסורא
